scripts.dev: powershell -Command "try { $pids = netstat -ano | findstr ':3001.*LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { $_.Split()[-1] } | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -ne '0' }; if ($pids) { Write-Host 'Liberando porta 3001...'; $pids | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F 2>$null } } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; nodemon server.js"
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -Command "try { $pids = netstat -ano | findstr ':3001.*LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { $_.Split()[-1] } | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -ne '0' }; if ($pids) { Write-Host 'Liberando porta 3001...'; $pids | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F 2>$null } } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; nodemon server.js"
